title: PlayerPing!
description: A mod that lets you ping other players with @
body:
PlayPing! is a new mod that lets you ping players as if its Discord

 

So simple to use:
Simply type @theplayersusername and they will be pinged (Requires them to have the mod)

 

After getting pinged you will notice the text that pinged you is blue and you hear a noise alerting you about the ping
